fresh_context_contract: Each repeat invokes one full baseline/optimized harness run. The harness creates fresh detached git worktrees and launches separate Claude/Codex task sessions for baseline and optimized runs.

environment.OPTIMIZED_SETUP_COMMAND: RLM_SOURCE="${RLM_SKILL_SOURCE:-$ANALYZER_REPO/.data/benchmarks/external-tools/claude-rlm/rlm-skill}"; test -d "$RLM_SOURCE" || { echo "Missing claude-rlm skill. Clone https://github.com/Tenobrus/claude-rlm to $ANALYZER_REPO/.data/benchmarks/external-tools/claude-rlm or set RLM_SKILL_SOURCE."; exit 2; }; mkdir -p .benchmark-tools; rm -rf .benchmark-tools/rlm-skill; cp -R "$RLM_SOURCE" .benchmark-tools/rlm-skill
